name: Lemon-Anise-Poppy Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and poppy seeds.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the rind of one lemon, lemon extract, anise extract, powdered egg substitute (reconstituted), white soy yogurt, and orange juice.
3. Make a well in the dry ingredients and pour in the wet mixture. Gently stir until just combined.
4. Grease a bundt muffin pan with cooking spray or brush with oil.
5. Spoon equal portions of batter into each muffin cavity, filling them about two-thirds full.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for approximately 22 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool for an additional 10 minutes.
